title: Allow project finding source in CLI
goal: Add 'project' to the --source choices and help text of the 'mini findings' command so an adversarial-project finding can be recorded exactly as the prompt instructs, with a test covering --source project.

steps.title: Derive --source choices from FINDING_SOURCES
steps.detail: In src/cli.ts:403 replace hardcoded ['adversarial','verify'] with [...FINDING_SOURCES] (import from findingsStore) so the CLI cannot drift from the data model again.

steps.title: List project in findings help + option text
steps.detail: Update the command description at cli.ts:391 and the --source option description at cli.ts:402 to read adversarial | verify | project (default stays adversarial).

steps.title: Test: findingsAdd records project source
steps.detail: In src/commands/findings.test.ts add a case mirroring the verify test — findingsAdd({..., source: 'project'}) stores and reads back source === 'project'.

steps.title: Test: choices stay in sync with FINDING_SOURCES
steps.detail: Assert FINDING_SOURCES contains 'project' as a guard against future removal from the data model; add a comment explaining choices derive from it.

steps.title: Verify build, typecheck and tests pass
steps.detail: npm run build + typecheck + full test suite green.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 179: Allow project finding source in CLI
